de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.mgt

Class SpecificationRepository

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.mgt.SpecificationRepository

  • public final class SpecificationRepository
extends Object
    Central storage for all specification elements, such as contracts, class axioms, and loop invariants. Provides methods for adding such elements to the repository, and for retrieving them afterwards.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private Map<KeYJavaType,ImmutableSet<ClassAxiom>> allClassAxiomsCache
      This Map is used to store the result of getClassAxioms(KeYJavaType) to avoid that RepresentsAxiom and QueryAxiom are instantiated multiple times.
      private Map<KeYJavaType,ImmutableSet<ClassAxiom>> axioms 
      private Map<Pair<StatementBlock,Integer>,ImmutableSet<BlockContract>> blockContracts

      private TermBuilder tb

      Registers the passed class invariant, and inherits it to all subclasses if it is public or protected.

      Registers the passed class invariants.
      void addContract(Contract contract)
      Registers the passed (atomic) contract, and inherits it to all overriding methods.
      void addContractNoInheritance(Contract contract)
      Registers the passed (atomic) contract without inheriting it.
      void addContracts(ImmutableSet<Contract> toAdd)
      Registers the passed contracts.

      Registers the passed initially clause.
      void addInitiallyClauses(ImmutableSet<InitiallyClause> toAdd)
      Registers the passed initially clauses.
      void addLoopInvariant(LoopInvariant inv)
      Registers the passed loop invariant, possibly overwriting an older registration for the same loop.
      void addRepresentsTermToWdChecksForModelFields(KeYJavaType kjt)
      Represent terms belong to model fields, so the well-definedness check considers both of them together.
      void addSpecs(ImmutableSet<SpecificationElement> specs) 
      void addWdStatement(StatementWellDefinedness swd)
      Registers a well-definedness check for a jml statement.
      FunctionalOperationContract combineOperationContracts(ImmutableSet<FunctionalOperationContract> toCombine)
      Creates a combined contract out of the passed atomic contracts.

      Copies a loop invariant from a loop statement to another.

      Adds initially clause as post-condition to contracts of constructors.
      void createContractsFromInitiallyClauses()
      Adds postconditions raising from initially clauses to all constructors.

      Returns all registered contracts.
      ImmutableSet<Proof> getAllProofs()
      Returns all proofs registered with this specification repository.

      Returns all registered well-definedness checks.

      ImmutableSet<ClassAxiom> getClassAxioms(KeYJavaType selfKjt)
      Returns all class axioms visible in the passed class, including the axioms induced by invariant declarations.
      ImmutableSet<ClassInvariant> getClassInvariants(KeYJavaType kjt)
      Returns all known class invariants for the passed type.
      Contract getContractByName(String name)
      Returns the registered (atomic or combined) contract corresponding to the passed name, or null.
      ContractPO getContractPOForProof(Proof proof)
      Returns the PO that the passed proof is about, or null.

      Returns all registered (atomic) contracts for the passed target.
      ImmutableSet<IObserverFunction> getContractTargets(KeYJavaType kjt)
      Returns all functions for which contracts are registered in the passed type.
      private KeYJavaType getEnclosingKJT(KeYJavaType kjt)
      Returns the kjt for the outer class, if the passed kjt is a member class, and null otherwise.
      ImmutableSet<Contract> getInheritedContracts(Contract contract)
      Returns a set encompassing the passed contract and all its versions inherited to overriding methods.
      ImmutableSet<Contract> getInheritedContracts(ImmutableSet<Contract> contractSet)
      Returns a set encompassing the passed contracts and all its versions inherited to overriding methods.

      • unlimitedToLimitTaclets

        private final Map<IObserverFunction,ImmutableSet<Taclet>> unlimitedToLimitTaclets

      • allClassAxiomsCache

        private final Map<KeYJavaType,ImmutableSet<ClassAxiom>> allClassAxiomsCache

        This Map is used to store the result of getClassAxioms(KeYJavaType) to avoid that RepresentsAxiom and QueryAxiom are instantiated multiple times.

        It is strongly required that always the same instances are returned because Object.equals(Object) and Object.hashCode() is not implemented in instances of ClassAxiom and such the default reference check is done which off cause always fails in case of different references.

      • services

        private final Services services

      • tb

        private final TermBuilder tb

      • contractCounters

        private final Map<String,Integer> contractCounters

        public ImmutableSet<ClassInvariant> getClassInvariants(KeYJavaType kjt)

        This method is used by Visual DbC and has to be public.

        private void unregisterContract(Contract contract)
        Removes the contract from the repository, but keeps its target.

      • createContractsFromInitiallyClause

        private void createContractsFromInitiallyClause(InitiallyClause inv,
                                                KeYJavaType kjt)
                                         throws SLTranslationException
        Adds initially clause as post-condition to contracts of constructors. Creates a new contract if there is none yet.
        Parameters:
        inv - initially clause
        kjt - constructors of this type are added a post-condition
        Throws:
        SLTranslationException - during contract construction from history constraint

      • removeWdChecks

        private static ImmutableSet<Contract> removeWdChecks(ImmutableSet<Contract> contracts)
        Remove well-definedness checks from a given set of contracts
        Parameters:
        contracts - A set of contracts
        Returns:
        contracts without well-definedness checks

      • registerWdCheck

        private void registerWdCheck(WellDefinednessCheck check)
        Registers a well-definedness check. It does not take care of its visibility in the proof management dialog (this is done in registerContract(Contract, Pair)).
        Parameters:
        check - The well-definedness check to be registered

      • unregisterWdCheck

        private void unregisterWdCheck(WellDefinednessCheck check)
        Unregisters a well-definedness check. It does not take care of its visibility in the proof management dialog.
        Parameters:
        check - The well-definedness check to be unregistered

      • getWdChecks

        private ImmutableSet<WellDefinednessCheck> getWdChecks(KeYJavaType kjt)

        public void addClassInvariant(ClassInvariant inv)
        Registers the passed class invariant, and inherits it to all subclasses if it is public or protected.

        public void addClassInvariants(ImmutableSet<ClassInvariant> toAdd)
        Registers the passed class invariants.

      • createContractsFromInitiallyClauses

        public void createContractsFromInitiallyClauses()
                                         throws SLTranslationException
        Adds postconditions raising from initially clauses to all constructors. Warning: To be called after all contracts have been registered.
        Throws:
        SLTranslationException - may be thrown during contract extraction

      • addInitiallyClause

        public void addInitiallyClause(InitiallyClause ini)
        Registers the passed initially clause. Initially clauses in JML specify the post-state of any constructor of subtypes; they may particularly be used in interface types. To create proof obligations from initially clauses, the method createContractsFromInitiallyClauses adds them to the contracts of respective constructors (or adds a contract if there is none yet).
        Parameters:
        ini - initially clause

      • addInitiallyClauses

        public void addInitiallyClauses(ImmutableSet<InitiallyClause> toAdd)
        Registers the passed initially clauses.

      • getClassAxioms

        public ImmutableSet<ClassAxiom> getClassAxioms(KeYJavaType selfKjt)
        Returns all class axioms visible in the passed class, including the axioms induced by invariant declarations.

      • getModelMethodAxioms

        private ImmutableSet<ClassAxiom> getModelMethodAxioms()

      • addClassAxiom

        public void addClassAxiom(ClassAxiom ax)
        Registers the passed class axiom.

      • addClassAxioms

        public void addClassAxioms(ImmutableSet<ClassAxiom> toAdd)
        Registers the passed class axioms.

      • getProofs

        public ImmutableSet<Proof> getProofs(ProofOblInput po)
        Returns all proofs registered for the passed PO (or stronger POs).

      • getProofs

        public ImmutableSet<Proof> getProofs(Contract atomicContract)
        Returns all proofs registered for the passed atomic contract, or for combined contracts including the passed atomic contract

        public ImmutableSet<Proof> getProofs(KeYJavaType kjt,
                                     IObserverFunction target)

        Returns the PO that the passed contract is about, or null.

      • getPOForProof

        public ContractPO getPOForProof(Proof proof)

      • getProofOblInput

        public ProofOblInput getProofOblInput(Proof proof)
        Returns the ProofOblInput from which the given Proof was created.
        Parameters:
        proof - The Proof.
        Returns:
        The ProofOblInput of the given Proof or null if not available.

      • getTargetOfProof

        public IObserverFunction getTargetOfProof(Proof proof)
        Returns the target that the passed proof is about, or null.

      • registerProof

        public void registerProof(ProofOblInput po,
                          Proof proof)
        Registers the passed proof.

      • removeProof

        public void removeProof(Proof proof)
        Unregisters the passed proof.

      • getLoopInvariant

        public LoopInvariant getLoopInvariant(LoopStatement loop)
        Returns the registered loop invariant for the passed loop, or null.

      • copyLoopInvariant

        public void copyLoopInvariant(LoopStatement from,
                              LoopStatement to)
        Copies a loop invariant from a loop statement to another. If the original loop does not possess an invariant, none is set to the target. A possibly existing old registration will be overwritten, a registration for the original loop remains untouched.
        Parameters:
        from - the loop with the original contract
        loop - the loop for which the contract is to be copied

      • addLoopInvariant

        public void addLoopInvariant(LoopInvariant inv)
        Registers the passed loop invariant, possibly overwriting an older registration for the same loop.

      • getBlockContracts

        public ImmutableSet<BlockContract> getBlockContracts(StatementBlock block)

      • getBlockContracts

        public ImmutableSet<BlockContract> getBlockContracts(StatementBlock block,
                                                     Modality modality)

      • addBlockContract

        public void addBlockContract(BlockContract contract)

      • addSpecs

      • unlimitObs

        public IObserverFunction unlimitObs(IObserverFunction obs)

      • addRepresentsTermToWdChecksForModelFields

        public void addRepresentsTermToWdChecksForModelFields(KeYJavaType kjt)
        Represent terms belong to model fields, so the well-definedness check considers both of them together.
        Parameters:
        kjt - The relevant KeYJavaType

      • addWdStatement

        public void addWdStatement(StatementWellDefinedness swd)
        Registers a well-definedness check for a jml statement. It does not take care of its visibility in the proof management dialog.
        Parameters:
        swd - The well-definedness check

        public ImmutableSet<WellDefinednessCheck> getAllWdChecks()
        Returns all registered well-definedness checks.
